text:
Hi!

----
State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
    State-Changed-By: kevlo
    State-Changed-When: Mon Dec 4 06:44:24 PST 2000
    State-Changed-Why:
    What version of gcc you are running?
    alloc.h should be in /usr/include/g++, not /usr/local/include.

    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=23261
----

But what I have to do with /usr/local/include/alloc.h?

/usr/local/include/alloc.h    &&    /usr/include/g++/alloc.h   have
different sizes.
Different files.   May be coorrect    include  needed


#include <g++/alloc.h>

???

--
Alexandr Miasnikov
